name: Winston Lin
title: Product leader for developer platforms, serverless, and infrastructure
tagline: I work on cloud platforms and still like writing code when it helps make something clearer, faster, or easier to use.
intro_paragraphs: Most of my work sits at the intersection of product, infrastructure, and developer experience. I have spent the last several years working on CI/CD, Kubernetes, and serverless platforms inside OCI.

This site is where I keep the parts of that work that are worth making public: notes on developer platforms, migration patterns, small Python tools, and a few opinions on how technical products earn trust.
focus_areas: Migration readiness and practical product strategy
experience_highlights: Principal Product Manager for OCI Functions, focused on platform primitives, developer experience, and execution model
Previously led product work across OCI Kubernetes Engine and OCI DevOps / CI/CD
Built and launched internal platform capabilities that shortened delivery cycles and reduced operational drag
I like work that sits between product clarity and technical depth
now_items: Writing more openly about developer platform work
Turning real workflow pain into small public Python tools
Building a body of migration and DX notes that are actually readable
